Panini · Lunch
Ham and Cheese Panini
Grilled panini with shaved ham, melted cheddar cheese and wholegrain mustard on artisan bread
FJD$33
Price
1×
Portions
4 min
Prep
4 min
Cook
Lunch
Service
Ingredients
IngredientUnitQty
Bread
Artisan bread, slicedslices2
Protein
Shaved hamg80
Filling
Cheddar cheese, slicedg40
Sauce
Wholegrain mustardg15
Method
1
Spread wholegrain mustard on one inner face of bread.
2
Layer shaved ham and cheddar cheese.
3
Close panini. Press 3–4 min until golden and cheese melts.
4
Cut on diagonal. Plate with fries.
Plating Notes
Cut on diagonal, cheese melt visible. Fries alongside.
Equipment
Panini press · Bread knife
